title: Kidplokio Ultimate Fleet 50pc Multicolor Diecast Toy Cars Play Set for Boys 3+
description:
Vroom Vroom! Watch your child hold their very own car race with the Kids World Racing Car Carrier Toy Set! This cool carrier truck toy comes with 6 race cars, pretend accessories and a race track play met. The truck holds all of the accessories so cleaning up after playtime is quick and easy. The game map also comes with dice. The game is simple and fun - just throw the dice to start the game, and the first one who arrives to the terminal on the playmat is the winner! Kids will love pretend racing with this fun die-cast metal car set. All pieces are constructed of durable, high-quality materials and are safe for children ages 3 and up. This is a great gift set idea for young kids and race car fanatics!

Kidplokio Ultimate Fleet 50pc Multicolor Diecast Toy Cars Play Set for Boys 3+

Calling little ones with a need for speed! The Kidplokio Ultimate Fleet Multicolor Diecast Cars Playset comes with 50 different individual cars for hours of racing fun. A great value, multipurpose race car set that kids can use in conjunction with other car toys too. The large assortment of different colorful cars to choose from makes this toy car set totally unique!

With 50 different individual toy cars to choose from, kids won’t know which car to play with first! This ultimate fleet diecast car playset from Kidplokio is a fantastic starter set kids can play solo or with friends or siblings with lots of cars to go around and share.

Key Features

  • ULTIMATE 50PC DIECAST CARS FLEET: Calling little ones with a need for speed! The Kidplokio Ultimate Fleet Multicolor Diecast Cars Playset comes with 50 different individual cars for hours of racing fun; a great value, multipurpose toy cars set that kids can use in conjunction with other car toys too!
  • 50 UNIQUE TOY CARS TO CHOOSE FROM: With 50 different individual toy cars to choose from, kids won’t know which car to play with first! This ultimate fleet diecast car playset from Kidplokio is a fantastic starter set kids can play solo or with friends or siblings with lots of cars to go around and share
  • FINE MOTOR SKILLS TOYS: Designed with small hands in mind, these car toys for boys are excellent models for little ones to develop their fine motor skills and hand eye coordination while handling the race cars; and, not only is great for physical development, the cars will encourage lots of imaginative cosplay too!
  • GREAT TOYS TO TRAVEL WITH: Family trips far away or neighbor next door play dates, the diecast cars are lightweight and easy to carry from one place to the next without any extra weight or bulk; With vibrant colors and super cool decals, this car set will have little one’s engines revving whether at home or on the go!
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 18.5 x 14 x 1 inches; Weight: 1.75lbs; Color: Multi; Material: Metal; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KPL50729905
  • UPC: 810058482334
  • Color: Multi-Color
  • Size: 50 Piece Set

Designed with small hands in mind, these car toys for boys are excellent models for little ones to develop their fine motor skills and hand eye coordination while handling the race cars; and, not only is great for physical development, the cars will encourage lots of imaginative cosplay too! Made from safe, high quality materials so parents need not worry.

Family trips far away or neighbor next door play dates, the diecast cars are lightweight and easy to carry from one place to the next without any extra weight or bulk; With vibrant colors and super cool decals, this car set will have little one’s engines revving whether at home or on the go!

Let the racing begin!

Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts)

Recommended Ages: 3+
